recommendations.title: Ricky Gervais: Armageddon
recommendations.overview: Ricky Gervais dishes out controversial takes on political correctness and oversensitivity in a taboo-busting comedy special about the end of humanity.

recommendations.title: Ricky Gervais: SuperNature
recommendations.overview: With his signature pitch-black sense of humor, Ricky Gervais takes the stage at the London Palladium in this provocative stand-up comedy special.

recommendations.title: Eraserhead
recommendations.overview: First-time father Henry Spencer tries to survive his industrial environment, his angry girlfriend, and the unbearable screams of his newly born mutant child.

recommendations.title: Star Kid
recommendations.overview: Shy seventh-grader Spencer Griffith's life changes when the meteor falls into local junkyard and he finds a Cybersuit - the wise and strong robot from another galaxy. Spencer puts Cybersuit on and becomes a different kind of guy

recommendations.title: The Greatest Beer Run Ever
recommendations.overview: Chickie wants to support his friends fighting in Vietnam, so he does something wild—personally bring them American beer. What starts as a well-meaning journey quickly changes Chickie's life and perspective.

recommendations.title: Midnight Special
recommendations.overview: A father and son go on the run after the dad learns his child possesses special powers.

recommendations.title: iCarly: iGo to Japan
recommendations.overview: Carly, Sam and Freddie kick off their adventure in Japan on a tin can of a plane packed with caged possums and piloted by Spencer's odd acquaintance.

recommendations.title: Dave Chappelle: Sticks & Stones
recommendations.overview: Dave Chappelle takes on gun culture, the opioid crisis and the tidal wave of celebrity scandals in this defiant stand-up special.

recommendations.title: David Brent: Life on the Road
recommendations.overview: A camera crew catches up with David Brent, the former star of the fictional British series, "The Office" as he now fancies himself a rockstar on the road.

recommendations.title: That Sugar Film
recommendations.overview: One man's journey to discover the bitter truth about sugar. Damon Gameau embarks on a unique experiment to document the effects of a high sugar diet on a healthy body, consuming only foods that are commonly perceived as 'healthy'. Through this entert
